rationale: No regression in the ADR/process-conformance lens after the round-2 fix (bf01a21a..631d7c14, +143/-34, plan.md only). Frontmatter is byte-identical, so adr_citations (0040/0037/0036/0035/0034) and work_chunks are untouched. Top-level steps per bead are unchanged and all <=7: Bead 1 = 3, Bead 2 = 6, Bead 3 = 5. Provenance stays consistent: still exactly AC1-AC10 (no new row), the R->bead map is unchanged (R9->B1; R1-R5/R3b/R8->B2; R6,R7->B3), and the same four authored tests remain — the only Provenance edit strengthens the AC4 row's description to name the destructured-identifier-count pin (round-2 items 2/5), matching the amended TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet content. The new `TestLoad_ZeroConfigPanelModelsLoopDefaults` mention is a reference to an existing internal/config (109) test used as the e2e-setup panel: baseline, not a new deliverable. `mindspec validate plan` on the rebuilt branch binary exits 0 with only the unchanged advisory WARN (R=0.04). Plan-approve gates remain clear.
findings: Frontmatter (lines 1-38) byte-identical across bf01a21a..631d7c14 — adr_citations and work_chunks unchanged.
Top-level steps per bead: Bead 1 = 3, Bead 2 = 6, Bead 3 = 5 — all <= 7 (Bead 2 at 6 as the BRIEF states). The round-2 items folded into existing step/verification content, adding no new steps.

Provenance: 10 AC rows (AC1-AC10), unchanged count; R->bead map line unchanged; same four authored tests. Only the AC4 row's prose was strengthened (destructured-identifier-count pin, sandboxed codex entry) — consistent with the amended test.

TestLoad_ZeroConfigPanelModelsLoopDefaults exists already in internal/config/config_test.go and is cited only as an existing baseline in Bead 2's e2e-setup verification prose — a reference, not a new test 111 authors; no scope creep, no AC/R-map change.
validate plan @ 631d7c14 exits 0 with only decomposition-scope-redundancy R=0.04 (unchanged advisory) — no adr-cite-irrelevant, no adr-coverage-missing.
No new key_file_paths / files introduced (frontmatter identical), so no new ownership claim required; ADR-0036 same-diff-or-earlier invariant unaffected.
